terms_text: 📋 Terms of Use By using this bot you agree that: · You are 18 years of age or older · You will use this service for personal purposes only · You will not use results to harass or spam other users · We are not affiliated with Instagram / Meta · Your scan data is not stored on our servers Do you agree to the terms?
terms_declined: You must accept the Terms of Use to use this bot.
terms_required: ⚠️ You need to accept the Terms of Use before using the bot.
lang_select: Choose language / Выберите язык / Sprache wählen:
setup_welcome: 👑 Instagram Elite Scanner One quick question to set up your filter.
setup_q2_country: 2 / 4 — Filter by country? «From profile» = same country as the target Instagram user
setup_complete: 🎉 You're all set! 🎁 As a welcome gift — 3 free scans are already on your account. How it works: 1. Send any Instagram username or profile link 2. Choose who to scan — followers, following, or AI-suggested accounts 3. Set how many profiles to analyse 4. Browse the results and save the ones you are interested in Useful commands: · /liked — your saved profiles · /credits — check balance & buy more scans · /lang — change language · /settings — adjust search filter
setup_prompt:
👇 Send an account from your social circle to get started.

Example:
https://www.instagram.com/instagram/
welcome_back: 👑 Welcome back! {settings} 💳 Balance: {credits} scans Send an Instagram username or link. Change filter — /profile · Buy scans — /credits
settings_note: Changes take effect on the next scan.
mode_confirmed: Mode: {mode} How many profiles to scan?
scan_launched: ⏳ Elite scan started Target: @{username} • {mode} • {limit} profiles {settings} This will take 1–3 minutes.
scan_done_last_followers: This is the last batch — no more followers for this profile.
scan_done_last_following: This is the last batch — no more following for this profile.
more_loading: ⏳ Loading next batch… Target: @{username} • {mode} • {limit} profiles This will take 1–3 minutes.
no_more_followers: No more followers for this profile. Try another account.
no_more_following: No more following for this profile. Try another account.
liked_clear_confirm: ⚠️ Delete all {n} liked profiles? This cannot be undone.
new_prompt: Send an Instagram username for a new scan:
payment_success: ✅ Payment successful! 🎁 Plan {name} — +{credits} scans added 💳 Balance: {balance} scans Send an Instagram username to start:
delete_confirm_text: ⚠️ Delete profile? All your data will be erased: filter, liked profiles, credits. This cannot be undone.
delete_done: ✅ Your profile has been deleted. Use /start to create a new one.
